title: Beware of Blondes
writer: Harvey F. Thew, George C. Hull, Peter Milne
actors: Dorothy Revier, Matt Moore, Roy D'Arcy
plot: Jeffrey (Matt More), a jewelry store clerk prevents a robbery and, as a reward, given a vacation in Honolulu, provided that he transports a valuable emerald to the Hawaiian Islands. On the boat he meets a blonde named Mary (Doroth...
